character_backstory: They grew up in a forest cabin, where early hardship shaped how they see the world. It was not an easy start, but it taught them resilience.
character_evolution: Over time they left a busy downtown apartment behind and grew into someone stronger, learning to trust themselves and lead others through difficulty.
ideal_home: My ideal home is near a crowded city block, simple and calm, with room for people I love to gather.
background: I grew up in a forest cabin, and it shaped a lot of how I approach things now, for better and worse.
current_challenges: Lately I have been dealing with adjusting to a new relationship.
ten_year_outlook: In ten years I picture myself traveled extensively and living somewhere new.
